links.key: bird-黑白蒙霸鹟-e9ed6715__distributed_in__loc-路易-皮埃尔-维埃约-d872b74a
links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The black-and-white monjita (Heteroxolmis dominicana) is a species of passerine bird in the family Tyrannidae, the tyrant flycatchers. It is found in Argentina, Brazil, Uruguay and possibly Paraguay.Remsen, J
